items.title: Hollander POTD Ray Allen. UConn star was drafted 5th by MIN & traded to MIL. An incredible shooter/scorer had 21.8+ ppg 8 yrs in a row, peak of 26.4 in 06-07 w/SEA. Traded to BOS in 07-08 & was key to title there and MIA. His shot in 2013 Finals saved LBJ. HOFer.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Ray Allen. UConn star was drafted 5th by MIN & traded to MIL. An incredible shooter/scorer had 21.8+ ppg 8 yrs in a row, peak of 26.4 in 06-07 w/SEA. Traded to BOS in 07-08 & was key to title there and MIA. His shot in 2013 Finals saved LBJ. HOFer.
